# Code of Conduct

## Our standards

Participants are expected to:
- Be respectful and constructive.
- Focus on technical facts, not personal attacks.
- Accept feedback and collaborate in good faith.
- Avoid harassment, discrimination, and abusive behavior.

## Unacceptable behavior

- Trolling, insulting, or derogatory comments.
- Public or private harassment.
- Publishing others' private information without permission.
- Any conduct that is inappropriate in a professional setting.

## Enforcement

Project maintainers may remove, edit, or reject comments, commits, issues, and pull requests that violate this Code of Conduct.

Repeated or severe violations can result in temporary or permanent bans from repository participation.

## Reporting

If you experience or witness unacceptable behavior, report it through a private channel to the maintainers.
